steps.title: Distribute to simplify the right side
steps.content:
Start with $y = \frac{1}{2}(17x + 14) + 4x$. Distribute $\frac{1}{2}$ across the parentheses:
$$y = \frac{1}{2}(17x) + \frac{1}{2}(14) + 4x = \frac{17}{2}x + 7 + 4x$$

steps.title: Combine x terms and identify the slope
steps.content:
Combine the $x$ terms: $\frac{17}{2}x + 4x = \frac{17}{2}x + \frac{8}{2}x = \frac{25}{2}x$
The simplified equation is $y = \frac{25}{2}x + 7$, which is in the form $y = mx + b$. The slope is $\frac{25}{2}$ or $12.5$.
The answer is 12.5,25/2.
